notes: Verse BG 3.20: source pack triangulates 5 sources (vedabase.io, holy-bhagavad-gita.org, gitasupersite.iitk.ac.in, bhagavad-gita.us, GRETIL). Sanskrit Devanagari + IAST agree with vedabase canonical text. Anvaya complete with proper compound splitting. Translation by Prabhupada captured verbatim; Mukundananda cross-referenced. Shankara/Ramanuja excerpts captured fair-use with verbatim_excerpt_length recorded. Disagreements section names a specific lexical disagreement and explains tradition divergence honestly. Engineering layer preserves Sanskrit anchors (the realised actor's continued action for the world) and does not flatten to generic prose. Pass.
